name: wxcode-admin-kinetic-fitness
title: Kinetic Fitness Admin
description: Dark-mode gym and fitness studio operations dashboard — active member KPIs, live class schedule with capacity bars, weekly attendance area chart, members table with plan/status, and coach panel. Original energetic dark-green palette with lime accent.

query.en: Build me a dark-mode fitness studio admin dashboard — slim topbar with location switch, icon rail sidebar, 4 KPI tiles (active members, check-ins, classes, retention), class schedule with capacity, weekly attendance chart, members table, and coach panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode fitness studio admin dashboard — slim topbar with location switch, icon rail sidebar, 4 KPI tiles, class schedule with capacity, weekly attendance chart, members table, coach panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
